EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN SEA.
LIBYA.
1. VESSEL REQUESTING ASSISTANCE VICINITY 33-00N 014-00E.
   VESSELS IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO KEEP A SHARP
   LOOKOUT, ASSIST IF POSSIBLE. REPORTS TO MRCC ROME,
   INMARSAT-C: 424744220, PHONE: 390 6592 4145, 3906 5908 4409,
   FAX: 390 6592 2737, 3906 5908 4793, E-MAIL: ITMRCC@MIT.GOV.IT.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 780/14(53).
